title: qrafty's Archeology Dig Sites
description: This pack adds the archeology dig sites shown in MC Live 2020 to your world - and even with 3 variations! 🦒
body:
We all were sad when Mojang showed us these archeology dig sites but we never got them. 
So, this lightweight datapack/mod adds them to your MC world, even in 3 variations!

You can find and loot them in the desert, dark forsts and taigas. Have fun!
